plugins.name: pr-comment-fixer
plugins.description: A plugin to automatically fix issues mentioned in PR comments

plugins.name: hardcore-code-reviewer
plugins.description: Strict hardcore code reviewer that spawns 12 parallel subagents to review code from every angle: bugs, security, architecture, tests, error handling, performance, complexity, observability, API contracts, data/migrations, accessibility, and type safety

plugins.name: shopify-apps
plugins.description: A plugin to help with shopify apps

plugins.name: github-issue-generator
plugins.description: Evaluates findings and ideas from conversations and creates high-value GitHub issues. Checks for duplicates before creating, and updates existing issues with new findings instead of creating redundant ones.

plugins.name: obsidian-knowledge-bank
plugins.description: A persistent, indexed knowledge bank that stores learnings, ADR decisions, technical context, and session notes as markdown files inside your repo.
